_notes: A1-v2: identical store and geometry to conflict-001, but the answer surface carries a one-sentence justification (cursor/codex audit requirement, rubric v1.3) so usage scoring has observable behavior beyond ablation. Oracle remains substring on the hostname.
question: It is Thursday 13:55. The maintenance window opens in five minutes. Which host do you migrate the api-gateway service to? Answer with the hostname, then one sentence explaining why.

records.text: Plan from last quarter: migrate the auth-gateway service to host vega-12 during a weekend maintenance window. Postponed indefinitely.
Plan for Thursday: migrate the api-gateway service to host vega-12 during the 14:00-15:00 maintenance window.
Observed during Wednesday's load test: vega-12 reached 92% memory usage with only half of production traffic replayed.
Update to Thursday's migration: after the capacity review, the api-gateway target host changed from vega-12 to vega-15. Window unchanged.
